channel.title: Frontity release: Frontity Chakra Theme
channel.description:
We are happy to share with you the new, free Frontity theme powered by the amazing [Chakra UI](https://chakra-ui.com/) React Component Library: **Frontity Chakra Theme**. 🎉
A beautiful and modern theme to build your blog and showcase your best photography.
It has been designed and developed by [Segun Adebayo](https://twitter.com/thesegunadebayo), creator of Chakra UI and author of the [Frontity’s Twenty Twenty theme port](https://community.frontity.org/t/frontity-release-twentytwenty-theme-beta/930). Thanks @Segun!
📚 **Read more** about the theme in our [blog post](https://blog.frontity.org/introducing-frontity-chakra-theme?utm_source=forum&utm_medium=frontity-chakra-theme-announcement-post&utm_campaign=frontity-chakra-theme-release).
⚡ **Live demo**: https://frontity-chakra.now.sh/.
✨ Highlighted **features**:
* Chakra’s Theming Functionality * Reading Progress Indicator * Search Modal * Social Links
![new-frontity-chakra-theme|690x389](upload://Ag2NCP1nxssVvEgwX25N492v2wd.png)
## Installation
You can install the Frontity Chakra theme like other published packages in Node using `npm`.
To do so, run this command in your terminal:
``` npm install frontity-chakra-theme ```
Then add `frontity-chakra-theme` to your `frontity.settings.js` file
-----
> 🧐 To learn how to **configure the theme options** and take a look at the **code**, please refer to the GitHub repo: https://github.com/chakra-ui/frontity-chakra-ui-theme.
Let us know what you think about it!

item.title: Frontity release: Frontity Chakra Theme
item.dc:creator: ali
item.description:
I’ll try it out shortly, thank you all for your hard work on this. Cheers!

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity release: Frontity Chakra Theme
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We are happy to share with you the new, free Frontity theme powered by the amazing Chakra UI React Component Library: Frontity Chakra Theme.

A beautiful and modern theme to build your blog and showcase your best photography.

It has been designed and developed by Segun Adebayo, creator of Chakra UI and author of the Frontity’s Twenty Twenty theme port. Thanks @Segun!

Read more about the theme in our blog post.

Live demo: https://frontity-chakra.now.sh/.

Highlighted features:

  • Chakra’s Theming Functionality
  • Reading Progress Indicator
  • Search Modal
  • Social Links

Installation

You can install the Frontity Chakra theme like other published packages in Node using npm.

To do so, run this command in your terminal:

npm install frontity-chakra-theme

Then add frontity-chakra-theme to your frontity.settings.js file

To learn how to configure the theme options and take a look at the code, please refer to the GitHub repo: https://github.com/chakra-ui/frontity-chakra-ui-theme.

Let us know what you think about it!

Read full topic
